summary: Tested complete flow: Mom shares birth plan → Doula sees notification on dashboard → Doula accepts → Both can message. Photo upload API also tested. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 requested features tested and working correctly
Doula dashboard correctly shows 'New Connection Requests' section only when pending requests exist
Accept/Decline buttons work as expected - Accept changes status from pending to accepted
Mom and Doula can exchange messages after connection is accepted
Photo upload API (PUT /api/auth/update-profile) works for both picture and full_name fields

new_test_doula.note: Created during testing to demonstrate Accept flow visually

seed_data_creation: Created new_test_doula_1771383718@test.com to test Accept flow. Share request share_f70d6aed0663 was created and accepted during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full share flow tested end-to-end: 1) Mom shares with Doula via POST /api/birth-plan/share, 2) Doula sees pending request on dashboard with Accept/Decline buttons, 3) Doula accepts via PUT /api/provider/share-requests/{id}/respond, 4) Both can message via POST /api/messages. Photo upload tested via PUT /api/auth/update-profile.

elements_verified: 'New Connection Requests' section with heart icon
Request text: 'Wants to share their birth plan with you'

feature_3_doula_can_accept.behavior: Accept button click changes status from 'pending' to 'accepted', section disappears when no more pending requests

tested: Mom can send message to Doula
Doula can send message to Mom
Chat shows message bubbles with timestamps

feature_5_photo_upload.notes: Profile picture persists and is returned in GET /api/auth/me
